segments.text: The kick is working, but forward smash!
segments.original_text: キックが効いているが、横スマッシュ!

segments.text: Forward smash! Wasn't that read on the whiff punish too early?
segments.original_text: 横スマッシュ!確定の差し返しの判断、早すぎないか?

segments.text: Setting up those quick-startup tools to handle Luigi's neutral game paid off, but...
segments.original_text: ルイージの近接と戦うために発生の早い鉄ツールを用意した甲斐があったが

full_text: The kick is working, but forward smash! Forward smash! Wasn't that read on the whiff punish too early? Setting up those quick-startup tools to handle Luigi's neutral game paid off, but...

corrections.rule: Move: よこせまっす→横スマッシュ
Move: よこせまっす→横スマッシュ
Steve term: キックツール→鉄ツール
